channel.title: ElementUI on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ElementUI on yexca'Blog

item.title: ElementUI
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash ElementUI, built by the Ele.me team, is a desktop UI component library for developers, designers, and product managers, powered by Vue 2.0. Components are the building blocks of a webpage, like links, buttons, images, tables, forms, and pagination. Vue2.x Official Site: International Mainland China Vue3.x Official Site: https://element-plus.org/zh-CN/#/zh-CN ElementUI Installation Install the ElementUI library (in your current …
